titles.title: Lord Help Me To Hold Out

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: Lord, help me to hold out :/ 3x Until my change has come

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My way may not be easy You did not say that it would be But when it gets dark Can't see my way Told me to put my trust (3X's) in Thee

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hold out When my way gets weary I can Hold out Until my change comes

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hold out Hold out, don't give up Help is on the way
